name: holeesheet
title: HoleeSheet
description: HoleeSheet render pipeline — compile a simple story script into a Discord chat video and render it to MP4 (voices, SFX, music, images). Exposes the holeesheet MCP tools to the agent.

useCase.query: Write and render a HoleeSheet short-form Discord chat-drama video using the holeesheet MCP tools (make_episode, compile_script, render_episode, list_voices, submit_feedback).
